figures.caption: Fig. 5. MS-SSIM↑ (orange) and LPIPS↓ (blue) comparison between SSCDM and baseline methods on (a) FFHQ and (b) CelebA datasets.
Fig. 3. Heatmaps of 16-QAM transition matrix for the ground-truth, SSCDM, and DCDDM under different SNR conditions.
Fig. 8. Heatmaps of Euclidean distances between each codeword constructed by using LVQ, LVQ + CR, and LVQ-SOM.
Fig. 6. Reconstructed images from SSCDM and baseline methods with varying SNRs.

Fig. 1. An illustration of (a) vector quantization (M = 16), (b) constellation symbol mapping (M = 16), (c) forward and reverse diffusion processes (M = 4), and (d) the design philosophy of the proposed discrete diffusion model (M = 4). Note that the value of M differs in (a)–(d) for visualization purposes only, while it should remain consistent throughout the actual system.
